allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./output/mf-data.json''\); const intl=d.categories.International||[]; const intlNames=intl.map\(f=>f.name\); const nasdaq=intlNames.filter\(f=>/nasdaq/i.test\(f\)\); console.log\(''Nasdaq in Intl:''\); nasdaq.forEach\(n=>console.log\('' '',n\)\); console.log\(''Total Intl funds:'',intl.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./output/mf-data.json''\); Object.keys\(d.categories\).forEach\(cat=>{const funds=d.categories[cat]; const n=funds.filter\(f=>/nasdaq/i.test\(f.name\)\); if\(n.length\) { console.log\(cat+'':''\); n.forEach\(f=>console.log\(''  '',f.name\)\); }}\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./output/mf-data.json''\); console.log\(''Categories:'', Object.keys\(d.categories\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Fund count:'', d.fundCount\);")
